description: AroundDeal is a global B2B database with 160M+ verified contacts and a LinkedIn extension for finding emails and phone numbers.
tagline: Global B2B database and sales intelligence
overview: AroundDeal is a global B2B data platform with more than 160 million verified contacts across 247 countries, powering prospecting, CRM enrichment, and recruiting.
what_is: AroundDeal is a global B2B data intelligence platform that gives teams access to more than 160 million verified contacts and company details across 247 countries. It focuses on accurate, current data so sales, marketing, and recruiting teams can find and reach the right people quickly.

It works best for building targeted contact lists, enriching CRM records, and prospecting, and it includes a browser extension for finding emails while browsing LinkedIn. AroundDeal is built for actionable business contact and company data rather than consumer data or deep analytics.
